subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath spoken through the sovereign power of His Will in the Kingdom of Utterance, whereupon all within the realm of contingent being were thunderstruck [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق بسلطان مشیته فی ملکوت البیان اذا انصعق من فی الامکان و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @wisdom [hikmat], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity
